top_signals.title: Europe Wary Of Too Much Dependence on U.S. LNG
top_signals.summary: European buyers aren’t committing to long-term LNG supply agreements with U.S. exporters despite the ongoing EU phase-out of Russian gas imports and the supply crisis in the Middle East. U.S. developers and proponents of new LNG export facilities in America have been trying to lock in long-term supply deals with European importers, with little success so far this year, U.S. executives have told Bloomberg. The Europeans are interested in discussions, but not really committing to long-term supply deals, according to the American LNG exporters.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US kills leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang in air strike

top_signals.title: UK defense secretary resigns in protest of government spending plan
top_signals.summary: In his resignation letter to Starmer, Healey said he had now seen the defense funding plan, and it “falls well short of what is required."

top_signals.title: Komeito aims to merge with CRA before next parliamentary session
top_signals.summary: Informed sources say the party plans to declare its plan to join the CRA in July and formally approve the move at a party convention by September.
